snippet.title: Richard Dawkins vs Piers Morgan On Religion and Gender | The Full Interview
snippet.description:
Piers Morgan Uncensored is joined by evolutionary biologist Richard Dawkins to discuss his controversial views on religion, gender identification and much more.

Richard believes that religion is just a vehicle to try and understand things which are too complex for humans to understand. Piers questions how he can say with such confidence that a God doesn't exist, Richard replies by saying that it's possible, just like having "fairies at the bottom of your garden".

Richard then explains that as a biologist who studies evolution, he can say with confidence that when it comes to gender "There are two sexes and that's all there is to it". Richard also suggests that people such as JK Rowling have been bullied on social media for standing up for their opinion which he claims is damaging to society by not having the wider debate on the issue.

Piers Morgan Uncensored is joined by evolutionary biologist Richard Dawkins to discuss his controversial views on religion, gender identification and much more.

Richard believes that religion is just a vehicle to try and understand things which are too complex for humans to understand. Piers questions how he can say with such confidence that a God doesn't exist, Richard replies by saying that it's possible, just like having "fairies at the bottom of your garden".

Richard then explains that as a biologist who studies evolution, he can say with confidence that when it comes to gender "There are two sexes and that's all there is to it". Richard also suggests that people such as JK Rowling have been bullied on social media for standing up for their opinion which he claims is damaging to society by not having the wider debate on the issue.

snippet.title: The Only SEAL Team 6 Operator That Went To Delta Force
snippet.description:
Chris VanSant, a former 1st Special Forces Operational Detachment–Delta (1st SFOD-D) operator, joins us for a two-part series on the Shawn Ryan Show. With a military experience of 20 years, Chris has served in the 75th Rangers, 82nd Airborne, Green Beret, and Delta Force. He has completed 11 combat deployments to Afghanistan, Iraq, and the Horn of Africa, and has taken part in nearly 600 combat missions, including the capture of Saddam Hussein and the hunt for al-Zarqawi

snippet.title: Karl Pilkington Explains Why He's Not a Millionaire #karlpilkington #comedy #viralvideo #shorts
snippet.description:
You're Watching: Karl Pilkington Explains Why He's Not a Millionaire #karlpilkington #comedy #viralvideo #shorts

Karl Pilkington, the comedian known for his unique perspective and dry wit, sets the record straight in this viral video - he's not a millionaire! In his trademark deadpan style, Pilkington shares his thoughts on the trappings of wealth and fame, and why they hold no appeal for him. He also quips his own experience on how he managed living waiting for his tvshows payouts. This candid and humorous video is sure to resonate with anyone who's ever dreamed of being rich and famous, but ultimately realized that money can't buy happiness. Watch now and join the conversation!

snippet.title: Jordan Peterson Finally Confessed His Belief in God
snippet.description:

What happens when Piers Morgan confronts Jordan Peterson on his faith and spirituality? The result is a stunning interview that will blow your mind. Piers Morgan asks Jordan Peterson some of the most personal and provocative questions about God and prayer, but Jordan Peterson responds with shocking, honest, and remarkable answers that reveal his fear of God and his commitment to prayer. Don’t miss this video to see how Jordan Peterson impresses Piers Morgan with his views on God and religion.
